name: Eidolon — Pacific Rim AU
description:
Warning for possible: Death, Gore.

(Proxy highly recommended!!)

I’m in my Pacific Rim arc so, figured i’d make a bot of it!

Took some...creative liberties with this one but I tried to be as accurate and faithful to the original and best movie with absolutely no sequels, Pacific Rim.

Michi is a new Ranger, and so is the user

Note: if you haven’t watched Pacific Rim (why haven’t you?) this will contain spoilers as this takes place during the Hong Kong battle.
